records.question: Which calendar dates correspond to reviews of the Marriage and population document where the day number is at most 3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN all_documents ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = all_documents.date_stored
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Review' AND all_documents.document_name = 'Marriage and population' AND ref_calendar.day_number <= 3
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Calendar_Date FROM Ref_Calendar AS T1 INNER JOIN All_Documents AS T2 ON T1.Calendar_Date = T2.Date_Stored INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types AS T3 ON T2.Document_Type_Code = T3.Document_Type_Code WHERE T3.Document_Type_Name = 'Marriage and population document' AND T1.Day_Number <= 3

records.question: Which calendar entries correspond to documents that were planned and actually destroyed on the same day, where the document type is exactly Book?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN documents_to_be_destroyed ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date AND ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date
JOIN all_documents ON documents_to_be_destroyed.document_id = all_documents.document_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Calendar_Date FROM Ref_Calendar AS T1 INNER JOIN Documents_to_be_Destroyed AS T2 ON T1.Calendar_Date = T2.Planned_Destruction_Date INNER JOIN All_Documents AS T3 ON T2.Document_ID = T3.Document_ID INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types AS T4 ON T3.Document_Type_Code = T4.Document_Type_Code WHERE T2.Planned_Destruction_Date = T2.Actual_Destruction_Date AND T4.Document_Type_Name = 'Book'

records.question: Which calendar entries match up with documents that have the document type name exactly as 'Review'?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN all_documents ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = all_documents.date_stored
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Review'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.Calendar_Date
FROM Ref_Calendar AS T1
INNER JOIN All_Documents AS T2
  ON T1.Calendar_Date = T2.Date_Stored
INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types AS T3
  ON T2.Document_Type_Code = T3.Document_Type_Code
WHERE
  T3.Document_Type_Name = 'Review'

records.question: Which calendar entries on day number 8 or later correspond to books named exactly Cats and me where the planned and actual destruction dates are the same?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT ref_calendar.calendar_date FROM ref_calendar
JOIN documents_to_be_destroyed ON ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.actual_destruction_date AND ref_calendar.calendar_date = documents_to_be_destroyed.planned_destruction_date
JOIN all_documents ON documents_to_be_destroyed.document_id = all_documents.document_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON all_documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE all_documents.document_name = 'Cats and me' AND ref_calendar.day_number >= 8 AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.Calendar_Date
FROM Ref_Calendar AS T1
INNER JOIN Documents_to_be_Destroyed AS T2
  ON T1.Calendar_Date = T2.Planned_Destruction_Date
INNER JOIN All_Documents AS T3
  ON T2.Document_ID = T3.Document_ID
WHERE
  T1.Day_Number >= 8 AND T3.Document_Name = 'Cats and me' AND T2.Planned_Destruction_Date = T2.Actual_Destruction_Date
